name: United States v. Eurodif S.A.
question: Should 19 U.S.C. Section 1673, which calls for "antidumping" duties on foreign goods, but not services, that sell at less than fair value in the U.S., apply to imported low enriched uranium?
description: A case in which the Court found that the Commerce Department's view of imported low enriched uranium as the sale of goods rather than services was permissible.
